purpose: Evaluate whether a rules-first workflow or low-cost model fallback can identify hard retail planning constraints before a recommendation is made. These tasks test arithmetic discipline, feasibility checks, and escalation boundaries for OTB, MOQ, pack multiple, margin, capacity, compliance, and timing constraints.
design_principles: Treat hard constraints as gates rather than soft preferences.
Separate feasibility checking from business recommendation.
Require exact arithmetic and explicit pass or fail status.
Reward escalation when an exception request would override a policy, margin, safety, or capacity limit.
Make rules-only baselines competitive when the task is truly deterministic.

ambiguity_sources: exception request conflicts with hard constraint
unit and cost arithmetic buried in prose
capacity limit conflicts with demand signal
margin floor breached by vendor or promo request

forbidden_behaviors: recommend an action before reporting pass or fail
treat a hard constraint as a soft preference
ignore pack, MOQ, margin, capacity, or compliance checks

criteria: Identifies every hard constraint that passes or fails.
Correctly labels blocking versus non-blocking conditions.
Does not waive a constraint without source-supported approval.
Uses the exact constraint threshold from the prompt.
Computes totals, deltas, or capacity usage correctly.
Preserves units and avoids rounding that changes feasibility.
Separates the provided evidence from assumptions or desired outcomes.
Flags escalation when a blocker, compliance issue, or exception request exists.
Explains why the case cannot auto-pass.
Returns parseable JSON with concise check-level results.

items.title: Beauty OTB and MOQ Feasibility Gate

input.proposal: Launch three serum textures at 900 units each.

items.question: Check whether the proposed launch is feasible. Return only constraint status and blockers, not a launch recommendation.

blocking_constraints: Fixture: three SKUs need 6 facings but only 4 are open
non_blocking_warnings: Each SKU clears 600 MOQ and pack multiple 12

items.ambiguity_type: hard-rule feasibility under incomplete exception context
items.expected_failure_mode: The answer approves an infeasible exception by ignoring a hard deterministic rule.
items.scoring_rationale: Score should reward deterministic feasibility checks, blocked/non-blocked separation, and appropriate escalation.

items.title: Storage Bin Pack Multiple and Labor Check

input.proposal: Allocate 1,150 bins across 23 stores for a weekend reset.

items.question: Check feasibility against pack multiple, store case capacity, and labor. Do not decide a revised allocation.

blocking_constraints: 1,150 units is not divisible by case pack 8
Maximum store capacity is 23 x 6 x 8 = 1,104 units
138 cases x 14 minutes = 32.2 labor hours if capped at capacity; proposal units would need 143.75 cases and is invalid

items.ambiguity_type: hard-rule feasibility under incomplete exception context
items.expected_failure_mode: The answer approves an infeasible exception by ignoring a hard deterministic rule.
items.scoring_rationale: Score should reward deterministic feasibility checks, blocked/non-blocked separation, and appropriate escalation.

items.title: Coffee Promo Margin Floor Check
items.question: Check whether the proposed price match clears margin and inventory guardrails. Do not recommend a price.

blocking_constraints: Gross margin at $7.99 is 28.0 percent, below 32 percent floor
non_blocking_warnings: Inventory cover is only 1.4 weeks and replenishment is 12 days away

must_not_include: use regular retail margin as promo margin
items.ambiguity_type: hard-rule feasibility under incomplete exception context
items.expected_failure_mode: The answer approves an infeasible exception by ignoring a hard deterministic rule.
items.scoring_rationale: Score should reward deterministic feasibility checks, blocked/non-blocked separation, and appropriate escalation.

items.title: Electronics Substitute Compliance Gate

input.proposal: Use substitute charger C-188B to fill 2,400 ecommerce backorders.

items.question: Check whether this substitute can pass automated release gates. Do not recommend launch or cancellation.

blocking_constraints: Barcode does not match original SKU
non_blocking_warnings: Margin clears floor at about 68.0 percent

must_not_include: treat FCC received as sufficient for UL

items.title: Berry Weather Spike With DC Capacity

input.source_note: Heatwave forecast adds 18 percent berry demand in the Southwest for 6 days. The DC has 92 percent cold-chain capacity already committed, inbound raspberries are 2 days late, and last year's comp was stockout-censored in 38 percent of stores.

items.question: Check whether the requested action is feasible. Separate blocking constraints from warnings.

expected_output.escalation_reason: At least one deterministic control gates the requested action.

must_not_include: treat last year's comp as clean demand
escalation_triggers: cold-chain capacity exceeds safe receiving limit
